bulk.deleteDesc: They will be removed from the organization and from every group. Anyone with a login keeps their account — only their link to this organization is removed. This cannot be undone.

studentDashboard.subtitle: Keep reaching new heights!
studentDashboard.heroTitleNoOrg: Enter the workspace to start your learning adventure!

landing.heroTitle: Build, manage, and scale your entire education system — in one platform
landing.heroSubtitle: From course creation to AI-graded exams, real-time quizzes, and certified achievements — everything your organization needs to deliver world-class education at scale.
landing.heroStack: LMS + Exams + AI + Gamification + Certificates + Chat
landing.heroFeaturesLabel: Everything your school needs — in one platform:
landing.featuresSubtitle: Eight integrated systems working together to power your organization
landing.whyUsSubtitle: A complete education operating system built for organizations that need more than a simple learning platform
landing.why1Desc: Not just content delivery — courses, exams, certificates, gamification, and communication in one integrated product.
landing.why2Desc: Multi-tenant architecture designed for schools, academies, and companies — not individual creators.
landing.why3Desc: Generate lessons, create exams, and evaluate open-ended answers with built-in AI capabilities.
landing.why4Desc: Role-based access control, audit logging, anti-cheat systems, and enterprise-grade data security.
landing.why5Desc: From 10 students to 10,000 — SaaS infrastructure that grows with your organization.
landing.why6Desc: Multi-language platform with localized certificates and international payment support.
landing.rolesSubtitle: Specialized interfaces for every participant in the educational process
landing.roleStudentDesc: A unified control panel to track learning progress
landing.roleStudentF1: Detailed statistics, gradebook, and weekly schedule
landing.roleStudentF2: Track XP level, badges, and leaderboard rankings
landing.roleStudentF3: Access lectures, take online exams, and chat with classmates
landing.roleTeacherDesc: A powerful toolkit for teaching and creating content
landing.roleTeacherF1: Quickly create courses, interactive lessons, and quizzes
landing.roleTeacherF2: Launch Live Exam Rooms with real-time anti-cheat
landing.roleTeacherF3: Manage the electronic gradebook and view group analytics
landing.useCasesSubtitle: Flexible platform that adapts to how you teach
landing.ucSchoolsDesc: Complete K-12 solution with gradebooks, schedules, and parent communication.
landing.ucTrainingDesc: Professional certification programs with progress tracking and verified diplomas.
landing.ucCorporateDesc: Employee onboarding, compliance training, and skill development at scale.
landing.ucOnlineDesc: Fully digital learning with live exams, quizzes, and automated certificates.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your organization's needs
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about SabakHub
landing.faq1Q: How is this different from a regular LMS?
landing.faq1A: Most platforms only handle lessons. SabakHub runs the whole center: live exams with anti-cheating, electronic attendance gradebooks, payments and finance tracking, and managing all your branches from one place.
landing.faq2Q: Are there limits on the number of students?
landing.faq2A: Limits depend on your selected plan. «Basic» is perfect for starting and small courses, «Professional» is built for medium-sized learning centers, and «Enterprise» is designed for large networks with no hard limits on student capacity.
landing.faq3Q: Which plans include the AI Manager and Test generation?
landing.faq3A: The full suite of Artificial Intelligence features (the 24/7 AI Assistant on your school page, automated exam question generation, and auto-grading of open answers) is exclusively included in the «Enterprise» plan.
landing.faq4A: Yes. Starting from the «Professional» plan, you can automatically generate and issue PDF certificates featuring a unique verification QR code and multi-language support. The certificates cannot be forged.
landing.faq5Q: Is my data and my students' data secure?
landing.faq5A: Security is built into every layer: strong encryption, separate access rights for each role, an admin action log, and complete data isolation for every center.
landing.ctaSubtitle: We'll migrate your courses and data, train your team, and help you launch.
landing.footerDesc: AI-powered education platform for schools, academies, and organizations worldwide.
landing.featuresPageSubtitle: A complete breakdown of everything SabakHub offers
landing.pricingPageSubtitle: Transparent pricing for organizations of every size
landing.aboutPageSubtitle: We're building the future of organized education
landing.aboutMissionText: To make world-class education infrastructure accessible to every school, academy, and training center — regardless of size or budget.
landing.aboutProductText: SabakHub is an AI-powered, multi-tenant education platform that combines course management, exam systems, gamification, certificates, and real-time communication into one integrated solution. Built by educators and engineers who understand the challenges of scaling education.
landing.aboutTeam: Built by a team that cares
landing.aboutTeamText: We're a small, focused team of engineers and educators based in Central Asia. We build software that solves real problems for real organizations.
landing.contactPageSubtitle: Have questions or want a demo? We'd love to hear from you.
landing.contactSent: Message sent! We'll get back to you shortly.
landing.docsPageSubtitle: Learn how to set up and use SabakHub
landing.docsGettingStartedDesc: Create your organization, invite teachers, and set up your first course in minutes.
landing.docsCoursesDesc: Build structured courses with modules, rich text lessons, video content, and downloadable materials.
landing.docsExamsDesc: Create exams with multiple question types, launch PIN-protected rooms, and review detailed results.
landing.docsAiDesc: Use AI to generate lesson content, create exam questions, and evaluate open-ended student answers.
landing.docsGamificationDesc: Configure XP, levels, badges, and leaderboards to keep students engaged and motivated.
landing.docsCertificatesDesc: Issue PDF certificates with QR verification, custom templates, and multi-language support.
landing.docsChatDesc: Set up group chats, enable direct messaging, and manage real-time communication within your organization.
landing.docsApiDesc: Connect external tools and services through our REST API and webhook system.
landing.aiSecSubtitle: Built-in AI turns your materials into ready-made exams and quizzes in seconds. Describe a topic or upload a PDF — the platform does the rest.
landing.aiSecF1Desc: Upload a theory file or describe a topic with a prompt. The AI comes up with questions, wrong answers and explanations on its own.
landing.aiSecF2Desc: Automatic grading saves your time, and students immediately get a thorough explanation of their mistakes.
landing.tgSecTitle: Automate sales with a Telegram AI Assistant
landing.tgSecSubtitle: Connect a neural network to your Telegram bot! Your AI assistant chats with clients 24/7 right in the messenger, answering based on platform data — and you configure it from inside SabakHub.
landing.tgSecF1Desc: The bot knows your courses, prices and schedule. Settings sync with the platform — no made-up facts!
landing.tgSecF2Desc: Set prompts, welcome messages and edit the FAQ right in the admin panel. The bot follows your script in Telegram exactly.
landing.teachSecTitle: Full control over the learning process
landing.teachSecSubtitle: Get rid of routine, paper journals and Excel sheets. Manage schedules, review homework on a convenient Kanban board and track finances in a single premium environment.
landing.teachCard1Desc: Mark attendance and grades. All statistics are generated automatically.
landing.teachCard2Desc: A handy Kanban board, built-in audio player, PDF and code review.
landing.teachCard3Desc: Track transactions and keep records of branch income and expenses.
landing.teachCard4Desc: Secure role architecture: administrator, manager, teacher, student.
landing.studSecTitle: Learning students want to come back to
landing.studSecSubtitle: Motivate students with a balanced system of rewards, badges and levels. Homework can be submitted in any format, even from a mobile phone.
landing.studItem1Desc: Healthy competition via an in-course leaderboard. Tracking your level motivates regular studying.
landing.studItem2Desc: Submit phone photos, pronunciation audio recordings, PDF documents and code archives without freezes.
landing.studItem3Desc: At any moment a parent can open the app on their smartphone and check attendance records and grades.
landing.nichesSubtitle: The platform adapts to different formats — from classic language schools with live groups to online courses and corporate training.
landing.niche1Desc: Easy upload of content (up to 50 MB), video lessons and materials. A student portal.
landing.niche2Desc: Upload audio recordings for Speaking review. The teacher listens to audio right in the platform.
landing.niche3Desc: A handy Kanban for homework review, grading and scheduling in one click.
landing.niche4Desc: Access to interactive quizzes, live sessions and detailed analytics (Pro plan).
landing.niche5Desc: Instant attendance tracking in the smart journal and payment control.
landing.niche6Desc: Hierarchical access, management of managers, teachers and branches.

directory.title: Find Your Learning Center
directory.subtitle: Discover the best schools and learning centers in Central Asia
directory.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, city, or subject...

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Main control panel. Here is a summary of your activity, upcoming events, and key metrics.
dashboard.t1: Click on widgets to quickly jump to the desired modules.
dashboard.t2: The dashboard adapts to your role: administrators see organization finances, while teachers see their groups.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.desc: Module for creating interactive educational longreads. You can add text, video, formulas, and attach files.
lessons.f3: Access can be configured for specific groups
lessons.t1: Use "/" (slash) in the editor to quickly open the blocks menu.
lessons.t2: Click "AI Generate" to let the neural network create a lesson outline for you based on a topic.

materials.title: Materials
materials.desc: Unified file library. Upload PDFs, presentations, videos, and audios to attach them to lessons or assign to students directly.
materials.t1: Students only see files you explicitly granted access to (or attached to a lesson).

exams.title: Exams (Test Bank)
exams.desc: Here you create the structure of tests and exams, write questions, and configure correct answers.
exams.t1: The exam itself is just a template. For students to start taking it, you need to create an "Exam Room" and select this exam in it.

rooms.title: Exam Rooms
rooms.desc: Live sessions for taking exams. You create a room, set a time, share a link or PIN code with students — and control the process in real-time.
rooms.t1: Share the room link or tell students to enter the PIN code on the "Join" screen.
rooms.t2: You can live-track who is on which question.

quiz_library.title: Quiz Library
quiz_library.desc: Create vibrant, gamified interactive games (Kahoot or Quizizz style). Suitable for a warm-up in class or a quick knowledge check.
quiz_library.t1: Run the quiz on a projector, and let students answer from their phones.

quiz_sessions.title: Quiz History & Games
quiz_sessions.desc: Launch quizzes and view the history of past games with detailed analytics for each player and question.

journal.title: Journal
journal.desc: Gradebook and attendance registry. Track student academic performance by dates.
journal.t1: Students do not see the group journal, they only see their own grades in their personal cabinet.

gradebook.title: Grades (Final)
gradebook.desc: Consolidated grade matrices across all groups. Useful for wrapping up a quarter, semester, or year.

groups.title: Student Groups
groups.desc: Organizing students into classes or groups. A group can be assigned a course, exam, or lesson all at once.

courses.title: Courses (Programs)
courses.desc: Large educational programs uniting lesson modules, exams, and materials.
courses.t1: Create a course and add lessons to it so students can easily navigate the learning structure.

finances.title: Finances (CRM)
finances.desc: Tracking payments, debts, and student subscriptions.
finances.t1: The platform does not deduct money automatically; this module acts as an accounting book (CRM) for your admin.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.desc: Planning classes, lectures, and exams. Displayed as a calendar.
schedule.t1: Assign a class to a group, and it will automatically appear in the calendars of all students in that group.

teacher_analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
teacher_analytics.desc: Principal/Headteacher dashboard. Detailed breakdown of teacher effectiveness and student engagement.

risk_dashboard.title: Risk Traffic Light
risk_dashboard.desc: AI churn prediction module. The system automatically highlights students in red who have started studying poorly or skipping.
risk_dashboard.t1: Pay attention to the "red" zone — contact these students or their parents as soon as possible.

org_settings.title: Organization Settings
org_settings.desc: Global parameters: name, logo, pricing plans, integrations (Telegram, AI), and public profile.
org_settings.t1: Fill out the public profile so your organization appears in the platform's global Directory.

schedule.timetableBanner: Recurring timetable — lessons here are linked to days of the week and repeat every week automatically.
schedule.dndHint: Drag lessons between days. Right-click → Copy, Ctrl+V → Paste.

pwa.installDesc: Quick access from your home screen — works like a native app

finances.courseHint: If you pick a course, this expense counts towards that course's profitability on the Overview tab.
finances.deleteExpenseBody: The record will be deleted permanently and will drop out of the reports.
finances.name: Name
finances.expenseByCategoryHint: Where the money went in the selected period
finances.courseProfitCaveat: Gross margin: only expenses linked to a course are counted. Teacher payroll is not allocated across courses.
finances.noCourseDataHint: Courses will show up here once they have payments or expenses.
finances.unattributedHint: These expenses are not deducted from any course. You can link an expense to a course on the Expenses tab.
finances.unassignedTitle: Some money has no branch — it is not included in the figures above
finances.unassignedHint: To see it together with the rest, switch to "All branches".
finances.noData: No data for the selected period
finances.truncatedWindow: Not all payments for this period are shown — the server returns at most 5000 records. The totals below are incomplete, pick a shorter period.
finances.noPayments: There were no payments in this period
finances.noPaymentsHint: Every payment accepted in the selected period will show up here.
finances.fillStudentCourseAmount: Pick a student and a course, and enter an amount
finances.planPurposePlaceholder: What the invoice is for: textbooks, exam...
finances.coursePriceMissing: This course has no price set — enter the amount manually
finances.refundTooLarge: More than this payment — the maximum is
finances.refundNote: The refund goes into Expenses, and the invoice will show a debt of the same amount again. The original payment stays in the history.

home.heroEyebrow: A platform for learning centers and schools
home.heroSubtitle: SabakHub takes the routine off your plate: schedule, gradebook, payments, exams and parent reports — all in one place, in your language, with a Telegram bot.
home.visTgMsg: “Daniyar scored 87/100 on the grammar exam. Full report at the link.”
home.dayTitle: Not a feature list. Your ordinary Tuesday — without the chaos.
home.day1Desc: {{students}} and teachers see their day on their phones. Substitutions and reschedules take two clicks — everyone gets notified.
home.day2Desc: The teacher describes the topic — AI builds the test. {{students}} take it online, and open answers are graded automatically.
home.day3Desc: Grades, attendance and homework flow to parents in Telegram on their own. No more “what did we miss?”.
home.day4Title: The director sees the whole picture
home.day4Desc: Payments, attendance and performance across all {{groupsDat}} — on one screen. Or ask the Telegram bot.
home.fitTitle: One switch — and the platform becomes yours
home.fitDesc: Pick your institution type — SabakHub adapts its wording, grading scale and settings. No “universal CRM” where a school feels like a stranger.
home.fitNoteCenter: For learning centers: students, groups and a 100-point scale — the way you’re used to.
home.fitNoteSchool: For schools: classes, pupils and the familiar 5-point system.
home.fitNoteLanguage: For language courses: level-based groups and A–F letter grades.
home.fitNoteAcademy: For online academies: cohorts and progress in percent.
home.fitPreviewLabel: This is how your SabakHub will look
home.priceTitle: Cheaper than an hour of admin work
home.priceDesc: Prices in Kyrgyz som, no hidden fees. 14 days free on any plan — no card required.
home.plan1Desc: Up to 50 students. Courses, gradebook, attendance and Telegram notifications.
home.plan2Desc: Up to 300 students. Plus exams, live quizzes, AI-generated lessons and tests, gamification, QR certificates.
home.plan3Desc: No limits. Branches, financial analytics, priority support and turnkey data migration.
home.faq1Q: Is it hard to migrate our data?
home.faq1A: No. We migrate your students, groups and payment history from your spreadsheets ourselves — it usually takes one day.
home.faq2Q: Do teachers need to install anything?
home.faq2A: No. The platform runs in the browser on any device, and notifications arrive in Telegram — everyone already has it.
home.faq3Q: What happens after the 14-day free trial?
home.faq3A: You decide: stay on your plan or pay nothing. Your data won’t disappear — we hand it over to you either way.
home.faq4Q: Which languages does the platform support?
home.faq4A: Russian, Kyrgyz and English. Each user picks their own language.
home.ctaTitle: We’ll show your school in SabakHub — in 15 minutes
home.ctaDesc: We’ll migrate your groups and data, train your team and help you launch. No card, no commitment.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Ask the SabakHub team — you can attach a screenshot or a video.
support.responseTime: We usually reply within one business day
support.threadClosedHint: Request closed — write to reopen it
support.emptyBody: Describe the question in your own words. A screenshot or a short screen recording helps us sort it out faster.
support.placeholderAdmin: Reply to the user… “/” for quick replies
support.selectThread: Pick a request on the left to open the conversation.
support.noOrgLong: This user does not belong to an organization

greeting.title: Greeting
greeting.body: Hello! Thanks for contacting SabakHub support. I am looking into your question now.

inProgress.title: Taken in progress
inProgress.body: I have taken your request in progress. I am looking into it and will get back to you shortly.

needDetails.title: Need details
needDetails.body:
To look into this properly, could you tell me:
1. Which page does the problem occur on?
2. What were you doing just before it?
3. What happened instead of what you expected?

needScreenshot.title: Ask for a screenshot
needScreenshot.body: Could you send a screenshot or a short screen recording? That lets me see the problem through your eyes and answer faster. Use the paperclip button below to attach a file.

reproSteps.title: Steps to reproduce
reproSteps.body: Could you describe step by step what to do to make the error happen again? If it does not happen every time, let me know how often.

clearCache.title: Clear the cache
clearCache.body: Could you try reloading the page with a cache clear: Ctrl + F5 (Windows) or Cmd + Shift + R (Mac). That often clears the problem straight away.

tryAnotherBrowser.title: Try another browser
tryAnotherBrowser.body: Could you check whether the problem also happens in another browser or in a private window? That tells us whether it is a browser extension or the platform itself.

accessRights.title: Access rights
accessRights.body: This looks like an access-rights issue. Permissions are managed by the learning centre owner under “Team & roles” — ask them to open the section you need for your role.

planLimit.title: Plan limitation
planLimit.body: This feature is available on a higher plan. You can compare what each plan includes and switch under “Subscription” in the organization settings.

payment.title: Billing question
payment.body: For billing and invoices: the “Subscription” section in the organization settings shows your current plan, the next charge date and the payment history. If a payment has not shown up within an hour, write here and we will check it manually.

bugAccepted.title: Bug passed to the developers
bugAccepted.body: Confirmed — this is a bug on our side. I have passed it to the developers and will write here as soon as the fix ships. Thanks for reporting it!

featureRequest.title: Feature request noted
featureRequest.body: Thanks for the idea — I have added it to our feature-request list. We prioritise work by how many people ask for it, so your vote counts.

fixed.title: Fixed
fixed.body: The fix is live. Please reload the page (Ctrl + F5) and check — it should all work now. Let me know if anything is still off.

waitingReply.title: Waiting for your reply
waitingReply.body: I am waiting on your clarification to continue. If the question has already resolved itself, just say so and I will close the request.

closing.title: Closing the request
closing.body: Glad it is sorted! I am closing this request. If you need anything else, write in this same chat — the history is kept.

payroll.subtitle: Teacher pay rates and monthly payroll
payroll.tryOtherFilters: Try changing the search or the status
payroll.noWriteRight: You do not have permission to change payroll.
payroll.diagnosticsHint: This data did not make it into the calculation. Until it is fixed, the totals in the sheet below are lower than they should be.
payroll.diagnosticsCleanHint: Every lesson and payment this month is covered by a pay rate.
payroll.badAmount: enter an amount greater than zero
payroll.needReason: Give a reason for changing the amount — without one the change cannot be audited
payroll.reasonPlaceholder: Agreed extra pay for covering a class
payroll.reasonHint: The calculated amount is kept alongside — a manual change does not erase what the system computed.
payroll.needComponent: Add at least one pay component
payroll.percentNeedsScope: pick courses or groups — without them the percentage yields 0
payroll.needLabel: The pay rate name is required — it is printed on the pay slip
payroll.badRange: The end of the period cannot be earlier than the start
payroll.ruleBranchFixed: The branch of a pay rate cannot be changed. To move the pay to another branch, create a new pay rate starting in a later month.
payroll.ruleBranchFromSwitcher: Taken from the branch switcher. This pay rate will only appear in the payroll sheet of the selected branch.
payroll.ruleBranchOrgWideHint: "All branches" is selected, so the pay rate will be organization-wide: it goes into the combined sheet but not into any single branch's sheet. To tie it to a branch, select that branch in the switcher.
payroll.versioningHint: To change a pay rate, create a new one starting in a later month — the current one closes automatically. History for past months is never rewritten.
payroll.components: What the pay is made of
payroll.percentBaseHint: The percentage is taken from money actually received for the selected courses and groups, not from invoices issued. Refunds reduce the base.
payroll.sessionBasedWarning: Only lessons recorded through the attendance journal with the selected group are counted. A lesson with no teacher selected is not credited to anyone; a lesson with no duration does not count towards hourly pay. Check the "Missing records" panel in the payroll sheet.
payroll.sessionBasedFooter: Lesson records only appear when attendance is taken. If the journal is not kept, per-lesson, per-hour and per-student pay will be zero.
payroll.scopeHintAll: Every lesson by this teacher is counted, regardless of course or group.
payroll.scopeHintGroups: Only what belongs to the selected groups is counted. Courses are ignored when selecting by group — a group is more precise than a course.
payroll.scopeHintCourses: Everything in the selected courses is counted — all of their groups.
payroll.ruleFrozen: A payroll sheet using this pay rate is already approved — it cannot be deleted. Archive it instead: it will drop out of future calculations while the history is kept.
payroll.deleteFailed: Could not delete the pay rate
payroll.ruleFrozenEdit: A payroll sheet using this pay rate is already approved — it cannot be changed.
payroll.archiveFailed: Could not archive the pay rate
payroll.noRulesHint: Set up a pay rate for the teacher — without one nothing will be accrued to them in the sheet
payroll.archiveConfirm: The pay rate will drop out of calculations from the next recalculation on, but stays in the history of already approved sheets.
payroll.deleteConfirm: The pay rate "{{label}}" will be deleted permanently. If you only want to stop accruals, archive it instead.
payroll.deleteRuleForceTitle: This pay rate is already in a payroll sheet
payroll.deleteRuleForceCount: Payroll sheet lines linked to this pay rate: {{n}}. The sheet is not approved, so the lines will come back on recalculation — but without the pay rate their amounts will be zero. Delete anyway?
payroll.deleteRuleForce: This pay rate has lines in an unapproved payroll sheet. They will come back on recalculation, but their amounts will be zero. Delete anyway?
payroll.gateCalcPaid: This sheet is paid — it cannot be recalculated. Make corrections in the current open month.
payroll.gateCalcApproved: This sheet is approved — it cannot be recalculated. Make corrections in the current open month.
payroll.gateApproveDraft: Run the calculation first — there is nothing to approve yet.
payroll.gatePayDone: The sheet is paid. The expenses are already recorded.
payroll.gatePayNotApproved: Only an approved sheet can be paid.
payroll.calculateFailed: Could not calculate the payroll sheet
payroll.approveFailed: Could not approve the payroll sheet
payroll.payPartial: Lines recorded: {{ok}}, failed: {{bad}}. Run the payout again — what is already paid will not be doubled.
payroll.paid: Payroll paid and recorded as expenses
payroll.manualNeedFields: Select a teacher and enter an amount greater than zero
payroll.totalAllPages: across every line in the sheet, not just this page
payroll.manualHint: These lines are entered by a person and recalculation does not erase them: calculated lines are rebuilt, bonuses and deductions stay.
payroll.manualFrozen: The sheet is frozen — no lines can be added. Make the correction in the current open month.
payroll.paidLinkHint: The payouts are recorded as expenses in the "Payroll" category and linked to this sheet.
payroll.noSheet: The sheet for this month has not been calculated yet
payroll.noSheetHint: Press "Calculate" — the system will gather the accruals from the active pay rates and show what it could not account for.
payroll.noLinesHint: No teacher has an active pay rate for this month. Set up pay rates on the "Pay rates" tab and recalculate.
payroll.balanceHint: Accrued on approved sheets minus what was actually paid out
payroll.approveConfirmScoped: The sheet for {{period}} ({{scope}}) will be sealed: recalculation, manual amounts, bonuses and deductions become impossible afterwards. The total of {{total}} is locked in for good. Late corrections will have to go into the next open month.
payroll.payConfirm: An expense will be created in Finances → Expenses under the "Payroll" category for every line, totalling {{total}}. This cannot be undone from here — mistakes will have to be fixed by hand in Finances.
payroll.payConfirmLabel: Pay out and record as expenses
payroll.deleteLineConfirm: The line will be removed from the sheet permanently.

journal.subtitle: Daily attendance and notes
journal.noCoursesDesc: Create a course to start taking attendance
journal.sessionTeacherHint: The teacher who ran the lesson — used for payroll
journal.sessionDurationHint: Actual lesson duration, used for hourly payroll
